title: Who owns India's plant varieties? PVP Certification Explorer (India)
description: An interactive, weekly-updated explorer of plant variety protection certification data from India's Protection of Plant Varieties and Farmers' Rights Authority (PPV&FRA). Covers all certified varieties from the Act's commencement through the present, with detailed analysis of applicant category composition, crop-wise certification trends, and cotton seed market structure. Developed as part of doctoral research on the political economy of agricultural biotechnology regulation in India.

creators.name: Subash, Ambika
creators.affiliation: Centre for Economic Studies and Planning, Jawaharlal Nehru University
